positive: A minimalist and elegant stylized depiction of a soaring phoenix amidst a cosmic nebula. The phoenix should be highly detailed with vibrant, fiery reds, oranges, and golds, rendered in a strong, clean silhouette against a deep indigo and violet space background. Focus on dynamic, upward-sweeping wing lines and a powerful sense of motion. Composition should be centralized and symmetrical for maximal impact on fabric. Art style: modern vector illustration mixed with luminous watercolor washes, maintaining a high degree of graphic punch and print clarity. Studio lighting, ultra-high resolution, perfect contrast, graphic design art.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, poorly drawn, low detail, bad anatomy, grainy, noise, extra limbs, negative space.
